steps.title: Spot the hypothesis-and-refutation pattern
steps.content: The underlined sentence presents an intuitive explanation—”the difference is due to different levels of access to parks”—and the word “however” that follows signals the text will challenge it.

steps.title: Identify which choice describes this pattern
steps.content: The underlined portion presents a potential explanation for the team's findings that the text then refutes (the “however” clause shows proximity doesn't actually account for the difference in usage). Choices A, B, and C describe unrelated functions. That matches choice D — D is correct.
